What is traffic management?

Keeping people safe while essential work gets done

Whenever work happens on or near a road, laying utilities, repairing a carriageway, running an event or responding to an incident, the normal flow of vehicles, cyclists and pedestrians has to be controlled. Traffic management is the planning, signage and on-site control that keeps those road users, and the crews working among them, safe.

Safe Traffic Management plans and runs that control for you. We design compliant Traffic Management Plans, put qualified, ticketed controllers on the ground, and document every shift with real-time reporting, so government, civil, utilities and construction projects stay safe, compliant and moving.

We plan itTraffic Management Plans, permits and risk assessments built to TMR and Austroads standards.
We control itTicketed crews, signage and devices set up and run safely on live roads.
We protect peoplePedestrians, cyclists and motorists guided safely around active works.
We respond fastCrews and supervisors mobilised 24/7 for reactive and incident works.
We equip itVMS boards, barriers and signage supplied, delivered and maintained.
We prove itGPS-verified inspections and digital records, audit-ready every shift.

Who we are

A safety and compliance partner, not just a traffic controller

Safe Traffic Management is a Queensland traffic management provider built around safety, compliance and operational accountability. We combine qualified, ticketed crews with structured WHS systems, digital reporting and real-time compliance visibility, so government, utilities and major contractors can deliver complex, high-risk works with confidence.

Safety firstEvery decision made with risk control at the core.
AccountabilityWe own our work, our people and our outcomes.
Compliance excellenceHeld to the highest regulatory standards.
ReliabilityConsistent, professional delivery, on time.

FAQ

Questions, answered

The things clients ask most before engaging a traffic management partner. Need something specific to your site? Talk to our team.

Ask a question

We operate across South East Queensland, including Brisbane, the Gold Coast and the Sunshine Coast, as well as Northern New South Wales. Reach out about your site and we will confirm availability.

Yes. Every controller and implementer is screened, inducted and holds the relevant RIISS qualifications. We verify tickets and currency before crews reach your site.

We implement, operate and remove Traffic Management Plans in line with MUTCD QLD, the TMR Code of Practice and AS 1742, and can coordinate plan preparation where required.

Yes. We provide 24/7 reactive and emergency traffic management, including planned night and after-hours works with supervised, lit coverage.

Inspections are GPS-verified and time-stamped, corrective actions are tracked to closure, and a report is issued at the end of each shift, keeping your project audit-ready by default.

We hold $20M Public Liability cover and maintain the WHS systems, SWMS and risk assessments expected on government, utilities and major-contractor projects.

<script src="https://unpkg.com/lucide@0.460.0/dist/umd/lucide.min.js"></script>
<script>
lucide.createIcons();

/* ── Mobile menu ── */
const burger = document.getElementById('burgerBtn');
const sheet = document.getElementById('mobileSheet');
const burgerIcon = document.getElementById('burgerIcon');
let sheetOpen = false;

burger.addEventListener('click', () => {
  sheetOpen = !sheetOpen;
  sheet.classList.toggle('sheet--open', sheetOpen);
  burger.setAttribute('aria-expanded', sheetOpen);
  burgerIcon.setAttribute('data-lucide', sheetOpen ? 'x' : 'menu');
  lucide.createIcons({ nodes: [burgerIcon] });
});

sheet.querySelectorAll('a').forEach(a => {
  a.addEventListener('click', () => {
    sheetOpen = false;
    sheet.classList.remove('sheet--open');
    burger.setAttribute('aria-expanded', false);
    burgerIcon.setAttribute('data-lucide', 'menu');
    lucide.createIcons({ nodes: [burgerIcon] });
  });
});

/* ── Desktop dropdowns ── */
document.querySelectorAll('.nav-item[data-dropdown]').forEach(item => {
  const link = item.querySelector('.nav-link');
  const dd = item.querySelector('.dropdown');
  item.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
    dd.classList.add('dropdown--open');
    link.classList.add('nav-link--open');
  });
  item.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
    dd.classList.remove('dropdown--open');
    link.classList.remove('nav-link--open');
  });
  dd.querySelectorAll('a').forEach(a => a.addEventListener('click', () => {
    dd.classList.remove('dropdown--open');
    link.classList.remove('nav-link--open');
  }));
});

/* ── Location tabs ── */
document.querySelectorAll('.loc-tab').forEach(btn => {
  btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
    const idx = btn.getAttribute('data-loc');
    document.querySelectorAll('.loc-tab').forEach(b => b.classList.toggle('loc-tab--active', b === btn));
    document.querySelectorAll('.loc-panel').forEach(p => {
      p.classList.toggle('loc-panel--active', p.getAttribute('data-loc-panel') === idx);
    });
  });
});

/* ── FAQ accordion ── */
document.querySelectorAll('.faq-q').forEach(btn => {
  btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
    const item = btn.closest('.faq-item');
    const isOpen = item.classList.contains('faq-item--open');
    document.querySelectorAll('.faq-item').forEach(i => {
      i.classList.remove('faq-item--open');
      i.querySelector('.faq-q').setAttribute('aria-expanded', false);
    });
    if (!isOpen) {
      item.classList.add('faq-item--open');
      btn.setAttribute('aria-expanded', true);
    }
  });
});

/* ── Scroll reveal ── */
const revealEls = document.querySelectorAll('.reveal');
if (typeof IntersectionObserver !== 'undefined' && !window.matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)').matches) {
  const io = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
    entries.forEach(e => {
      if (e.isIntersecting) { e.target.classList.add('revealed'); io.unobserve(e.target); }
    });
  }, { threshold: 0.12, rootMargin: '0px 0px -6% 0px' });
  revealEls.forEach((el, i) => {
    const r = el.getBoundingClientRect();
    if (r.top < window.innerHeight * 0.92) { el.classList.add('revealed'); }
    else { io.observe(el); }
  });
} else {
  revealEls.forEach(el => el.classList.add('revealed'));
}

/* ── Counter animation ── */
const counters = document.querySelectorAll('[data-counter]');
if (typeof IntersectionObserver !== 'undefined' && !window.matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)').matches) {
  const cio = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
    entries.forEach(e => {
      if (!e.isIntersecting) return;
      const el = e.target;
      const value = parseFloat(el.getAttribute('data-value'));
      const prefix = el.getAttribute('data-prefix') || '';
      const suffix = el.getAttribute('data-suffix') || '';
      const duration = 1600;
      const t0 = performance.now();
      const tick = (t) => {
        const p = Math.min(1, (t - t0) / duration);
        const eased = 1 - Math.pow(1 - p, 3);
        const n = Math.round(value * eased);
        el.textContent = prefix + n.toLocaleString('en-AU') + suffix;
        if (p < 1) requestAnimationFrame(tick);
        else el.textContent = prefix + value.toLocaleString('en-AU') + suffix;
      };
      requestAnimationFrame(tick);
      cio.unobserve(el);
    });
  }, { threshold: 0.4 });
  counters.forEach(el => cio.observe(el));
}

/* ── Header: transparent → solid on scroll ── */
const siteHeader = document.getElementById('siteHeader');
function updateHeader() {
  siteHeader.classList.toggle('header--scrolled', window.scrollY > 60);
}
window.addEventListener('scroll', updateHeader, { passive: true });
updateHeader();

/* ── Form submit ── */
function handleFormSubmit(e) {
  e.preventDefault();
  e.target.style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('formSuccess').classList.add('form-success--visible');
  lucide.createIcons();
}

/* ── Services photo carousel (merged from Design 2) ── */
/* ── Services photo carousel (with dots) ── */
document.querySelectorAll('.svc-carousel').forEach(car => {
  const track = car.querySelector('.svc-track');
  if (!track) return;
  const tiles = track.querySelectorAll('.svc-tile');
  const dotsWrap = car.querySelector('.svc-dots');
  const stepBy = () => tiles.length > 1 ? tiles[1].offsetLeft - tiles[0].offsetLeft : (tiles[0] ? tiles[0].offsetWidth : 320);
  const padLeft = () => parseFloat(getComputedStyle(track).paddingLeft) || 0;
  const dots = [];
  if (dotsWrap) {
    tiles.forEach((t, idx) => {
      const b = document.createElement('button');
      b.type = 'button';
      b.className = 'svc-dot';
      b.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Go to service ' + (idx + 1));
      b.addEventListener('click', () => track.scrollTo({ left: t.offsetLeft - padLeft(), behavior: 'smooth' }));
      dotsWrap.appendChild(b);
      dots.push(b);
    });
  }
  const update = () => {
    const i = Math.round(track.scrollLeft / stepBy());
    dots.forEach((d, k) => d.classList.toggle('is-active', k === Math.max(0, Math.min(i, dots.length - 1))));
  };
  const go = dir => {
    const max = track.scrollWidth - track.clientWidth;
    let target = track.scrollLeft + dir * stepBy();
    if (dir > 0 && track.scrollLeft >= max - 4) target = 0;
    else if (dir < 0 && track.scrollLeft <= 4) target = max;
    track.scrollTo({ left: Math.max(0, Math.min(target, max)), behavior: 'smooth' });
  };
  const prev = car.querySelector('.svc-nav--prev');
  const next = car.querySelector('.svc-nav--next');
  if (prev) prev.addEventListener('click', () => go(-1));
  if (next) next.addEventListener('click', () => go(1));
  track.addEventListener('scroll', update, { passive: true });
  update();
});
</script>
